Recurring Transaction Templates
💡 Recurring Templates auto-generate monthly transactions (rent, salary, utilities, etc.) without manual re-entry. Amounts can change over time using Value History — the correct amount is auto-picked for each month. Click ⚡ Generate This Month to create missing transactions for the current month, or enable Auto on page load in settings.

Add Bonus Type
Edit Bonus Entry
💡 Expected Month = when you expect the bonus to arrive. Actual Paid Month = the month it actually lands in your account (may differ if delayed). Mark as ✅ Paid + add the ledger transaction separately — the Ledger will offer to link to this entry.
⚠️ Actual paid month differs from expected — this bonus was delayed. The ledger transaction will be logged under the actual paid month.
Log Expected Income
💡 Expected Month = when you expect to receive this income. Once you get paid, add a ledger transaction and link it here — the status will update automatically.

Edit Position
Control whether this position's salary is used in app calculations or kept as a private log only.
📌 Income is always posted on the 1st of the month. Integration month may be prorated or delayed depending on your rule.
How this company counts leave days. Drives accrual rate and day-weight calculations.
⚙️ Custom Model D Settings
→ 1.5/mo
🧭 Add Position
Tell us about this current position
Fill in the details. The date range will appear in your career timeline like a resume.
Control whether this salary feeds the financial ledger or stays as a private record.
How this company counts leave days. Drives all leave calculations.
Model A Mon–Fri standard (office/IT)
Mon=1, Tue=1, Wed=1, Thu=1, Fri=1 · 18d/yr · 1.5/mo
Model B Friday weighted (performance cost)
Mon=1, Tue=1, Wed=1, Thu=1, Fri=1.5 · 18d/yr · 1.5/mo
Model C Mon–Sat full, Sat counts as leave
Mon=1, Tue=1, Wed=1, Thu=1, Fri=1, Sat=1 · 18d/yr · 1.5/mo
🇫🇷 FR CDI France CDI — Code du Travail
25 jours ouvrés/an · 2.08/mo · Mon–Fri
🇫🇷 FR CDD France CDD/Intérim — proportionnel
2.5 jours ouvrables/mo · durée déterminée
Model D Custom — choose days & yearly leave
You pick working days + annual leave days
